sourcesReSearchedThisPass: /usr/include/hyprland — only protocol headers, no ConfigManager/AnimationManager source
/usr/share/hypr/stubs/hl.meta.lua (47788 bytes) — documents hl.animation but enumerates NO style values
/usr/share/hypr/hyprland.lua — style USAGE only ('style = "popin 87%"'), confirming styles are leaf-specific AND parameterized (a global dropdown would be wrong in shape)
conservativeSubsetConsidered: example configs show only 'popin <pct>%' and 'fade' in USE; these are usage instances, not an enumeration, and are parameterized. Building an editable subset from two usage examples would be guessing the grammar's shape (which values take a parameter, which leaves accept which styles). That is exactly the 'no guessing / trusted sources only' line. Style value stays preserved as raw text; no edit control is exposed.
reEnableCriteria: an authoritative per-leaf style enumeration (future descriptions export, typed stub, or installed source) + validator + parser/write/reread + save proof
note: the style FIELD's row is not among the 341 scalar rows; it is a structured-family (hl.animation) record field, tracked in the family matrix
